mapper.select: SELECT * FROM todos WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY due_date ASC
SELECT * FROM todos WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(due_date) = DATE(#{dueDate}) ORDER BY due_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos (user_id, title, description, status, priority, due_date, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{dueDate}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE todos SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, due_date = #{dueDate}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
